name: count
description: prefix lines by the number of occurrences

name: repeated
description: only print duplicate lines, one for each group

name: flag-D
description: print all duplicate lines --all-repeated[=METHOD] like -D, but allow separating groups with an empty line; METHOD={none(default),prepend,separate}

name: skip-fields
description: avoid comparing the first N fields --group[=METHOD] show all items, separating groups with an empty line; METHOD={separate(default),prepend,append,both}

name: ignore-case
description: ignore differences in case when comparing

name: skip-chars
description: avoid comparing the first N characters

name: zero-terminated
description: line delimiter is NUL, not newline

name: check-chars
description: compare no more than N characters in lines --help display this help and exit --version output version information and exit
